name: Sprint Training
desc: Warm-up: 12 minutes of light rowing. After 7 minutes, perform some intense 10-stroke bursts. Power Intervals: 200m x 12 rolling starts. Rest 2 minutes between each interval, 36-38 strokes/minute Intensity: 90%-95% of 500m PB Cool-down: 10 minutes of easy rowing.

name: VO₂ Max Training
desc: Warm-up: 12 min light. Interval Training: (40s hard/ 20s rest x 12) x 2 sets. Rest 4 min between sets. 28-30 s/m. Intensity: 75-85% of 500m PB.

name: Threshold Training
desc: Warm-up: 10 min light. Single Interval: 8 x 800m, 26 s/m. Rest 2:30. Intensity: 65-77% of 500m PB.

name: Sprint Training
desc: Warm-up: 10 min easy. Power Intervals: 150m x 20, 1:30 rest. 36-38 s/m. Intensity: 90-95% of 500m PB.

name: VO₂ Max Training
desc: Warm-up: 12 min light. Interval Training: 1:20 hard, 60s rest x 10. 28-30 s/m. Intensity: 75-85% of 500m PB.

name: Summer Solstice Challenge
desc: Warm-up: 5 min light. Single Distance: 21,097m (half marathon). 22-26 s/m. Intensity: 55-65% of 500m PB.

name: Sprint Training
desc: Warm-up: 12 min light. Power Intervals: 250m x 8. Rest 3 min. 36-38 s/m. Intensity: 90-95% of 500m PB.

desc: Warm-up: 10 min light. Interval Training: 8 x 500m. Rest 2:00. 28-30 s/m. Intensity: 75-80% of 500m PB.

name: Threshold Training
desc: Warm-up: 10 min light. Interval training: 4 x 7 minutes. Rest 3 min. 26 s/m. Intensity: 65-75% of 500m PB.

name: Sprint Training
desc: Warm-up: 15 min light. Interval Training: 5 x 300m at 90-95% with 5 min rest. 36-38 s/m.

desc: Warm-up: 10 min easy. Interval Training: 1,2,3,4,3,2,1 min pyramid. Rest 3 min. 28-30 s/m. Powerful strokes on the 1 min. Intensity: 70-80% of 500m PB.

name: Sprint Training

name: Sprint Training

name: Rowfit Games – Virtual Race: 1-Minute Test
desc: Warm-up: 15 min light. 1-Minute Test: row for maximum distance in 1 minute. Maximal effort. Record distance, watts, pace, stroke rate.

name: Rowfit Games – Virtual Race: 2000m Test
desc: Warm-up: 15 min light. 2000m Test: maximal effort time trial. Even pacing, strong finish. Record time, splits, watts.
